full_text:
Geng Wu (Wenwei)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Geng Wu, styledWenwei. Opposed Han Fu’s plans to surrender, Yuan Shao had him executed. Geng Wu was affiliated with the Han Fu Dynasty. Geng Wu lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
